summary: Employment Practices Liability insurance covering employers against claims by employees for wrongful termination, discrimination, harassment, and other employment-related wrongful acts. Growing UK line driven by ACAS early conciliation trends.

schemaEntities.description: Employer risk entity. Custom: EmployeeCount, AnnualPayroll, HighRiskRoles, UnionisedFlag, PriorEmploymentClaimsCount, HRHandbookUpToDate, EDI_PolicyInPlace, TribunalClaimsPA.
58 rules: employee count-based limit adequacy, prior tribunal claims loading, HR handbook currency check, unionised workforce loading, protected characteristic exposure scoring.

relationships.note: EPLI limit adequacy driven by employee count and prior claims history
HR handbook and EDI policy rules are premium modifiers

migrationIssues.detail: ACAS early conciliation number tracking for claims. GW Cloud claims management supports reference tracking -- ACAS portal integration for claim validation required.
Exposure scoring based on protected characteristic profile of workforce. Custom Gosu scoring algorithm -- GW Cloud rating rules can accommodate with configuration.
Employment tribunal claims history loading. GW Cloud prior claims loading supported natively -- straightforward migration.
Post-MeToo third party harassment extension. GW Cloud coverage extension model supports -- minor configuration work.

cloudMapping.action: Generic D&I indicator -- EPLI-specific scoring logic needs migration
ACAS conciliation number validation -- external API integration
